rationale: Educ. Code §48.009 governs PEIMS data reporting requirements for school districts. It contains no provisions related to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraised value thresholds, so no conflict arises.
quote: The commissioner by rule shall require each school district and open-enrollment charter school to report through the Public Education Information Management System information regarding:
_note: No operative connection between PEIMS reporting requirements and Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
